summary.rationale: Bug-hunt run on integration-test v2.9.1 (taskq project, 3 FRs). All 12 standard targets scanned across 4 lenses (correctness, security, reliability, performance). No critical/high issues confirmed. Quality evidence: 114 pytest tests pass with 100% coverage; mutation score 70.5% (above 70% threshold); reliability_lint preflight clean; SAB drift 0/16; gates 1+2 PASS (Gate 1 per-FR, Gate 2 composite 95.59). No findings to resolve.
